hero.title: Pest & Disease Management
hero.subtitle: Prevention-based protection strategy. Intervention costs are reduced through early diagnosis.

scope.title: Scope
items: Risk map — based on season, variety, and history
Biological control program — beneficial insect application schedule
Chemical intervention sequence — with rotation, MRL, and PHI considered
Early warning criteria for critical diseases

result.title: Deliverable
result.text: Written protection plan + application calendar + product list.

inquiry.title: Tailored to your site
inquiry.text: We prepare an individual quote based on your area, season stage, and goals.
